description: Phase 2: validate top-2 configs from Phase 1 screening at full scale. 800K PerfectBlend, 3 epochs. Winners: R03-WSD (WSD schedule) and R07-accum1 (accum=1, 2x optimizer steps). Baseline included for comparison.

base.common_overrides: training.dflash_num_anchors=512 inference.inference_num_gpus=2 training.training_num_gpus_per_node=6 training.fsdp_strategy=FULL_SHARD training.fsdp_reduce_dtype=bfloat16 training.prefetch_depth=8 training.max_checkpoints=2 training.save_interval=5000 dataset.eval_data_path=null

runs.name: P2-baseline
runs.description: Phase H baseline: cosine LR, accum=2 (control group)
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: P2-WSD
runs.description: WSD schedule: warmup-stable-decay with cosine final phase (Phase 1 winner)
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=WSD training.wsd_decay_ratio=0.2 training.wsd_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: P2-accum1
runs.description: accum=1: 2x optimizer steps per epoch, smaller effective batch (Phase 1 winner)
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=1 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0
